'''Balderdash''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adarlon/Legends|Adarlon]]<ref name="HN" /> that was connected to the world's [[Adarlon spaceport|spaceport]] by a [[whisper-transit]] transportation line.<ref name="GG">''[[Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters]]''</ref> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|51|life/13411_2.html|''Quest for Quasar'' Fans Don't Like Ottekvar}} is set on the date 13:4:11, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> the town was the origin of a [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] article titled "''Quest for Quasar Fans'' Don't Like Ottekvar." The story discussed the controversy surrounding the casting of the [[Actor/Legends|actor]] [[Harlan Ottekvar]] as [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Baltharog]] in the [[Holodrama/Legends|holofilm]] adaptation of ''[[Quest for Quasar]]'' production being made by [[Myris Pictures]].<ref name="HN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Balderdash was first mentioned in the [[1990]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters]]'', authored by [[Mark Rein-Hagen]] and [[Stewart Wieck]] and published for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG" />
